modal.description: Mangulina is available in English and Spanish.

ui.noQuery: Type something in the search box to begin.

feedback.title: Didn't find what you were looking for?
feedback.body: Help us make Mangulina even better. If an artist, song, album, or other information is missing—or if you spot something that needs updating—we'd love your contribution.
feedback.footer: Suggest an addition or report a correction. Every contribution helps preserve and document Dominican music for everyone.

homePage.intro: Mangulina is the Dominican Music Database, dedicated to preserving and documenting Dominican artists, recordings, releases, genres, and music history. Explore the people and songs that shape Dominican music across generations.

metadata.title: Privacy Policy
metadata.description: Read Mangulina's Privacy Policy and learn how information is collected, used, and protected on the Dominican Music Database.

privacy.title: Privacy Policy
privacy.heroDescription: Mangulina is committed to protecting your privacy. This Privacy Policy explains what information we collect, how we use it, and the choices available to visitors of the Dominican Music Database.

welcome.description: This Privacy Policy describes how information may be collected, used, and protected when you visit or interact with the Mangulina website.
welcome.acceptance: By using this website, you agree to the practices described in this Privacy Policy.

information.title: 1. Information We Collect
information.introduction: Mangulina may collect limited information when visitors use the website, including:

items.region: General geographic region based on IP address

information.closing: We do not sell personal information.

voluntary.title: 2. Information You Voluntarily Provide
voluntary.introduction: You may choose to provide information when:
voluntary.detailsIntroduction: Information you voluntarily provide may include:
voluntary.closing: We only use this information to respond to inquiries and improve the accuracy of the database.

cookies.title: 3. Cookies and Analytics
cookies.introduction: Mangulina may use cookies or similar technologies to:
cookies.analytics: We may use analytics services to better understand how visitors interact with the website.
cookies.disabling: Users may disable cookies through their browser settings, although some features may not function as intended.

use.title: 4. How We Use Information
use.introduction: Information collected through the website may be used to:

items.accuracy: Preserve the accuracy and quality of the database

sharing.title: 5. Information Sharing
sharing.noSale: Mangulina does not sell, rent, or trade personal information.
sharing.introduction: Information may be shared only when:

items.investigate: Necessary to investigate fraud, abuse, or security incidents
items.vendors: Required to operate services provided by trusted third-party vendors

thirdParty.title: 6. Third-Party Services
thirdParty.introduction: Mangulina may include links to external websites, including:
thirdParty.responsibility: We are not responsible for the privacy practices of third-party websites.
thirdParty.review: Visitors should review the privacy policies of those services separately.

security.title: 7. Data Security
security.measures: We take reasonable measures to protect information from unauthorized access, misuse, alteration, or disclosure.
security.limitation: However, no website or internet transmission can be guaranteed completely secure.

children.title: 8. Children's Privacy
children.audience: Mangulina is intended as a general audience informational resource.
children.collection: We do not knowingly collect personal information from children under the age of 13.
children.removal: If such information is discovered, reasonable efforts will be made to remove it.

international.title: 9. International Visitors
international.access: Visitors may access Mangulina from countries outside the United States.
international.processing: By using the website, visitors understand that information may be processed and stored in jurisdictions where the website and its service providers operate.

changes.title: 10. Changes to This Privacy Policy
changes.updates: We may update this Privacy Policy periodically.
changes.posting: Any changes will be posted on this page together with an updated "Last Updated" date.
changes.acceptance: Continued use of the website after changes become effective constitutes acceptance of the revised policy.

contact.title: 11. Contact
contact.contactPage: Questions regarding this Privacy Policy may be submitted through the <contact>Contact page</contact>.
contact.dmcaPage: Privacy requests, corrections, and concerns may also be submitted through the <dmca>Copyright & DMCA page</dmca> when applicable.

questions.title: Privacy Questions
questions.description: If you have questions about this Privacy Policy, information you have voluntarily provided, or how Mangulina handles privacy concerns, please contact us.

metadata.title: Terms of Use
metadata.description: Read the Terms of Use for Mangulina, the Dominican Music Database dedicated to documenting and preserving Dominican music history.

terms.title: Terms of Use
terms.heroDescription: Mangulina is an independent Dominican Music Database dedicated to documenting and preserving the history of Dominican music.

welcome.introduction: Welcome to Mangulina ("Mangulina," "we," "our," or "us"), the Dominican Music Database.
welcome.acceptance: By accessing or using this website, you agree to these Terms of Use. If you do not agree with these terms, please do not use the website.

about.title: 1. About Mangulina
about.description: Mangulina is an independent reference database dedicated to documenting, preserving, and promoting information about Dominican music, artists, recordings, releases, genres, and related cultural history.
about.informationalResource: Mangulina is an informational resource and does not provide music streaming, digital downloads, or music sales unless explicitly stated.

informational.title: 2. Informational Purposes Only
informational.purposes: The information provided on Mangulina is intended for educational, research, historical, editorial, and informational purposes.
informational.accuracy: While we strive to maintain accurate and up-to-date information, we do not guarantee that all content is complete, current, accurate, or free of errors.
informational.verification: Users should independently verify information when making decisions based on data found on the website.

intellectualProperty.title: 3. Intellectual Property
intellectualProperty.ownership: The Mangulina name, logo, design, original text, database structure, and original content are the property of Mangulina unless otherwise noted.
intellectualProperty.permittedUse: Users may view content for personal use, share links to pages on the website, and cite information with proper attribution.

items.copy: Copy substantial portions of the database
items.republish: Republish large amounts of content without permission
items.competingDatabase: Create competing databases using data obtained from Mangulina

thirdPartyContent.title: 4. Third-Party Content
thirdPartyContent.examples: Mangulina may display or reference artist names, album titles, recording titles, release information, cover artwork, photographs, external platform links, and embedded media.
thirdPartyContent.ownership: Such content remains the property of its respective owners.
thirdPartyContent.noAffiliation: The inclusion of third-party content does not imply ownership, endorsement, sponsorship, or affiliation unless expressly stated.

externalLinks.title: 5. External Links
externalLinks.examples: Mangulina may provide links to third-party services and platforms, including music streaming services, social media platforms, artist websites, and other external resources.
externalLinks.responsibility: We are not responsible for the content, availability, privacy practices, or policies of third-party websites.

rightsHolders.title: 6. Copyright and Rights Holders
rightsHolders.contact: Artists, labels, photographers, rights holders, and authorized representatives who believe that content appearing on the website infringes their rights may contact us through our <dmca>Copyright & DMCA page</dmca>.
rightsHolders.review: We will review all legitimate requests and take appropriate action when necessary.

conduct.title: 7. User Conduct

items.unlawful: Use the website for unlawful purposes
items.damage: Engage in activity that may damage the website or its services

conduct.indexing: Reasonable access by search engines and legitimate indexing services is permitted.

availability.title: 8. Availability of Service
availability.modification: We may modify, suspend, restrict, or discontinue any part of the website at any time without notice.
availability.noGuarantee: We do not guarantee uninterrupted availability of the website or its services.

warranties.title: 9. No Warranties
warranties.asIs: The website and its content are provided on an "as is" and "as available" basis.
warranties.disclaimer: To the fullest extent permitted by law, Mangulina disclaims all warranties, express or implied, including warranties of accuracy, merchantability, fitness for a particular purpose, and non-infringement.

liability.title: 10. Limitation of Liability
liability.limitation: To the fullest extent permitted by law, Mangulina shall not be liable for any direct, indirect, incidental, consequential, or special damages arising from the use of, or inability to use, the website or its content.

changes.title: 11. Changes to These Terms
changes.updates: We may update these Terms of Use from time to time.
changes.posting: The updated version will be posted on this page with a revised "Last Updated" date.
changes.acceptance: Continued use of the website after changes become effective constitutes acceptance of the revised terms.

contact.title: 12. Contact
contact.description: Questions regarding these Terms of Use may be directed through our <contact>Contact page</contact>.

editorial.title: Editorial Note
editorial.description: Mangulina's mission is to preserve and document the history, culture, and people of Dominican music. We welcome corrections, additional information, and contributions from artists, families, researchers, historians, and rights holders to help improve the accuracy and completeness of the database.

metadata.title: Copyright & DMCA
metadata.description: Mangulina's copyright and DMCA policy for the Dominican Music Database, including procedures for reporting copyright concerns.

dmca.title: Copyright Policy
dmca.heroDescription: Mangulina respects the intellectual property rights of artists, songwriters, publishers, record labels, photographers, and other rights holders. This page explains how copyright concerns may be reported and reviewed.

overview.title: Overview
overview.database: Mangulina is a curated Dominican music database dedicated to documenting and preserving information about Dominican music and the people who create it.
overview.reference: The website provides reference information such as artist profiles, recording information, release details, credits, awards, historical information, and links to third-party platforms.
overview.noHosting: Mangulina does not host, stream, sell, distribute, or provide downloadable copies of copyrighted music recordings.

policy.title: Copyright Policy
policy.respect: We respect the intellectual property rights of artists, songwriters, composers, publishers, record labels, photographers, and all other rights holders.
policy.action: If we become aware of material that infringes copyright or other intellectual property rights, we will review the matter promptly and take appropriate action where necessary.
policy.goal: Our goal is to preserve and organize information about Dominican music while respecting the rights of creators and rights holders.

thirdParty.title: Third-Party Content
thirdParty.introduction: Mangulina may display or reference information obtained from publicly available sources, including:

items.links: Links to streaming services and official websites

thirdParty.ownership: All trademarks, logos, recordings, videos, images, and other copyrighted materials remain the property of their respective owners.
thirdParty.noAffiliation: The inclusion of information within Mangulina does not imply ownership, endorsement, sponsorship, or affiliation unless explicitly stated.

claims.title: Copyright Infringement Claims
claims.introduction: If you believe that material appearing on Mangulina infringes your copyright or other intellectual property rights, please submit a written notice containing:

items.contactInformation: Your full name and contact information.
items.identification: Identification of the copyrighted work claimed to have been infringed.
items.location: The URL or specific location of the material in question.
items.goodFaith: A statement that you have a good-faith belief that the use is unauthorized.
items.accuracy: A statement that the information provided is accurate and that you are the copyright owner or authorized representative.

claims.action: Upon receipt of a valid notice, we will review the request and take appropriate action, which may include correction, removal, restriction, or further investigation of the material.

counterNotice.title: Counter-Notification
counterNotice.objection: If you believe that material was removed, restricted, or modified as a result of a mistake or misidentification, you may submit a counter-notification explaining the basis for your objection.
counterNotice.review: We will review all counter-notifications and may restore or revise material where appropriate and permitted by applicable law.

rightsHolders.title: Artists & Rights Holders
rightsHolders.introduction: Artists, managers, publishers, record labels, estates, and authorized representatives may also contact us to:

items.update: Update artist biographies or profile details
items.credits: Add missing credits or discography information
items.review: Request review of images or other content

rightsHolders.collaboration: Mangulina welcomes collaboration and strives to maintain accurate, respectful, and well-sourced information.

goodFaith.title: Good-Faith Commitment
goodFaith.mission: Mangulina's mission is educational, informational, and cultural.
goodFaith.commitment: We are committed to preserving Dominican musical heritage while respecting the rights and interests of artists, creators, and rights holders.
goodFaith.contact: If you have questions regarding this policy, please contact us and we will make every reasonable effort to resolve concerns promptly and professionally.

contact.title: Contact
contact.description: For copyright inquiries, infringement claims, attribution concerns, or rights-holder requests, please contact:

about.metadataDescription: Mangulina is a curated Dominican music database dedicated to preserving and documenting Dominican artists, songs, releases, credits, genres, and musical history.
about.title: About Mangulina™
about.heroDescription: Mangulina is a curated Dominican music database dedicated to preserving, documenting, and celebrating the artists, songs, recordings, releases, credits, and stories that shape Dominican music.
about.missionReference: To build the most comprehensive and reliable reference for Dominican music — preserving its history, documenting its creators, and making its cultural legacy more accessible to everyone.
about.missionAudience: Mangulina serves artists, researchers, historians, collectors, educators, developers, journalists, and music fans seeking structured and trustworthy information about Dominican music.
about.missionBelief: We believe Dominican music deserves a dedicated home where its people, recordings, releases, and achievements can be preserved, discovered, and appreciated across generations.
about.whyName: The name Mangulina is inspired by the traditional Dominican musical genre of the same name — a lively rhythm with deep roots in the country's cultural heritage.
about.whyPurpose: While the platform covers all genres and eras of Dominican music, the name serves as a tribute to the traditions that helped shape the nation's musical identity. It reflects the project's broader purpose: preserving and celebrating Dominican music in all its forms.
about.coverDescription: Mangulina is building a growing reference for Dominican music, connecting artists, recordings, releases, contributors, genres, and historical context in one searchable place.

coverItems.artists: Artists from every region and era of Dominican music
coverItems.recordings: Recordings with credits, genre classifications, and release details
coverItems.albums: Albums and releases with complete track listings
coverItems.creators: Songwriters, composers, producers, musicians, and other contributors
coverItems.history: Awards, musical history, and cultural context
coverItems.sources: Links to streaming platforms and official sources

about.principlesReview: Mangulina is curated with human review. We organize information carefully, verify details whenever possible, and welcome corrections from artists, representatives, researchers, collectors, contributors, and the public.
about.principlesRole: Our goal is not to replace official artist websites, streaming platforms, record labels, publishers, or rights holders. Instead, we aim to connect information, improve discoverability, and help preserve the history of Dominican music.
about.principlesEvolution: Music information is constantly evolving. As new information becomes available, entries may be updated, expanded, corrected, or refined over time.

principleItems.corrections: Corrections welcomed from artists, families, researchers, and the public
principleItems.respect: Respect for artists, rights holders, labels, and official sources
principleItems.heritage: A focus on preserving Dominican musical heritage across generations

about.artistNoteTitle: A note to artists and rights holders
about.artistNoteMission: Mangulina is dedicated to preserving, documenting, and celebrating Dominican music — and the people who create it. Every artist, songwriter, composer, producer, musician, and contributor included in this database represents an important part of that story.
about.artistNoteRights: We do not host, sell, stream, or distribute music. We do not claim ownership of recordings, artwork, lyrics, trademarks, or other creative works. Our role is limited to organizing and presenting music-related information and metadata for educational, informational, and reference purposes.
about.artistNoteContact: If you are an artist, representative, rights holder, or family member and would like to update, correct, enrich, or discuss any information appearing on the site, we encourage you to contact us.
about.discoveryDescription: Mangulina helps people discover connections across Dominican music — artists, recordings, releases, genres, contributors, awards, and historical context — through a structured and searchable catalog.
about.archiveDescription: Dominican music continues to evolve every day. Mangulina is designed as a living archive that grows alongside the music, expanding through research, community contributions, artist collaboration, and ongoing editorial review.
about.involvedWelcome: Mangulina welcomes participation from artists, researchers, historians, collectors, music professionals, and passionate fans who share an interest in preserving Dominican musical heritage.
about.involvedInvitation: Whether you would like to submit corrections, contribute information, enrich artist profiles, provide historical research, or become a contributor, we would love to hear from you.

contact.metadataDescription: Contact Mangulina, the Dominican Music Database, for artist updates, corrections, contributor opportunities, partnerships and copyright inquiries.
contact.title: Get in Touch
contact.intro: Whether you are an artist, researcher, contributor, rights holder, or music enthusiast, we would love to hear from you.
contact.welcome: Mangulina welcomes corrections, collaborations, historical research, artist updates, and general inquiries related to Dominican music.
contact.helpDescription: Choose the contact area that best matches your inquiry so it can reach the right part of the Mangulina team.

artists.title: Artists & Representatives
artists.description: Need to update a biography, add missing releases, submit corrections, provide official information, or enrich an artist profile?

correction.title: Submit a Correction
correction.description: Found inaccurate information, missing credits, incorrect dates, or other data issues?

contributor.title: Become a Contributor
contributor.description: Interested in helping preserve Dominican music through research, documentation, historical information, or editorial review?

partnerships.title: Media & Partnerships
partnerships.description: Press inquiries, educational institutions, cultural organizations, archives, and collaboration opportunities.

copyright.title: Copyright & DMCA
copyright.description: Questions about copyright, attribution, images, or intellectual property concerns?

contact.followDescription: Follow @MangulinaDO for project news, featured artists, Dominican music history, and database updates.
contact.emailDescription: Contact the appropriate inbox directly. General questions can be sent to hello@mangulina.do.
contact.preserveCommunity: Mangulina grows through the contributions of artists, historians, researchers, collectors, music professionals, and passionate fans.
contact.preserveInvitation: If you have information that can help document Dominican music more accurately, we would love to hear from you.

contributors.metadataDescription: Meet the contributors helping Mangulina, the Dominican Music Database, preserve, document and enrich Dominican music.
contributors.title: People Helping Preserve Dominican Music
contributors.description: Mangulina is built through research, review, correction, and collaboration. This page recognizes the people helping document Dominican music, its artists, recordings, releases, credits, and cultural history.
contributors.communityWelcome: Mangulina welcomes contributors, researchers, collectors, artists, musicians, historians, and music lovers who want to help preserve Dominican musical heritage.
contributors.communityWork: Contributors may help by reviewing artist profiles, correcting discographies, identifying credits, documenting regional history, or providing trusted references.
contributors.joinKnowledge: If you have knowledge about Dominican music, artists, recordings, credits, regional styles, historical context, or rare releases, Mangulina would love to hear from you.
contributors.joinImpact: Contributors help make Dominican music easier to discover, study, and preserve for future generations.

discover.metadataDescription: Explore Mangulina, the Dominican Music Database. Discover Dominican artists, songs, releases, genres, regions, creators, birthdays, Christian music, legends, and emerging artists.
discover.title: Discover Dominican Music
discover.description: Explore the Dominican Music Database through artists, songs, releases, genres, regions, creators, birthdays, and cultural categories.

releases.description: Create and edit albums, singles, EPs, compilations, release metadata, artist links, labels, and tracklists.

discography.description: Add and update artist releases, release dates, labels, catalog details, and discography metadata.

awards.description: Review artist awards, categories, sources, countries, years, and award-page relationships.

contributors.description: Create and maintain contributor profiles, specialties, publishing status, ordering, and profile images.

reviews.title: Pending Reviews
reviews.description: Triage profiles, recordings, links, metadata, and other database entries that need human review.

topGenreViews.description: Genre pages with the highest views. Shows which music styles resonate most with your audience. Use to prioritize genre curation and editorial features.

platformClicks.title: Platform Clicks - Last 30 Days
platformClicks.description: Aggregate clicks to streaming services (Spotify, Apple Music, YouTube, etc.). High clicks indicate strong user intent to listen. Monitor platform distribution to understand user preferences.

searchesNoResults.title: Searches With No Results
searchesNoResults.description: Queries that returned no matches. Critical indicator of catalog gaps. Shows what users are looking for that you don't have. Priority for content curation and database expansion.
